hero.titleMobile: WEB4 IS HERE. ACTIVATING YOUR VIBE4TRADING.

problem.question: HOW DO YOU KNOW IF YOUR STRATEGY ACTUALLY WORKS?

solution.heading: WE BENCHMARK IT FOR YOU.
solution.paragraph1: We run your agent through 10 real market regimes. Same rules. Same windows. No luck. Just performance.
solution.paragraph2: See where your strategy survives, where it cracks, and how to improve the next pass.

step1.title: PICK YOUR AGENT
step1.copy: Choose the model, prompt, market, and risk settings you want to benchmark.

step2.title: WE STRESS TEST IT
step2.copy: Run the same strategy through real historical windows with the same rules and data.

step3.title: GET YOUR VERDICT
step3.copy: See returns, drawdown, hit rate, event-level behavior, and summary analysis.

step4.title: OPTIMIZE AND COMPETE
step4.copy: Tune the prompt, rerun the trial, and compare yourself on the leaderboard.

trials.heading: THE 10 TRIALS
trials.subtitle: YOUR AGENT HAS TO SURVIVE ALL OF THEM.

trial2.name: WHITE HOUSE SUMMIT: SELL THE NEWS

trials.footer1: From flash crashes to boring chop.
trials.footer2: From liquidation cascades to slow institutional bleed.
trials.footer3: No safe windows. No cosmetic scoring.

archetypes.heading: TRADER ARCHETYPES
archetypes.subtitle: WHICH ONE MATCHES YOUR STRATEGY?

memeHunter.title: MEME HUNTER
memeHunter.name: Ansem
memeHunter.copy: "High-frequency short-term narrative chaser. Aggressive position sizing."

macroSpeculator.title: MACRO SPECULATOR
macroSpeculator.name: Arthur Hayes
macroSpeculator.copy: "Bidirectional swing trader driven by macro rhythms."

contractKing.title: CONTRACT KING
contractKing.name: PickleCat (0xPickleCat)
contractKing.copy: "Futures-dominant medium-frequency trader. High leverage, high conviction."

onChainDetective.title: ON-CHAIN DETECTIVE
onChainDetective.name: ZachXBT
onChainDetective.copy: "Low leverage, risk-first approach. Defense over offense."

supercycleBeliever.title: SUPERCYCLE BELIEVER
supercycleBeliever.name: Su Zhu (3AC)
supercycleBeliever.copy: "Perma-long with high leverage. Weak downside protection."

archetypes.footer: Your report maps behavior to recognizable trading archetypes, then points to the exact windows where that pattern helped or hurt.

team.heading: WHO WE ARE
team.subtitle: We build benchmark tooling for AI-native trading workflows.
team.footer: Built for the Web4 trading era.

finalCta.heading: READY TO FIND OUT?
finalCta.description: Configure in minutes. Benchmark on real market windows. Iterate with evidence.
